text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, machines can generate art, music, and even writing. For example, AI programs can create paintings in the style of famous artists, compose original songs, or write short stories. This raises an interesting question: can machines be truly creative? Human creativity comes from emotions, personal experiences, and imagination. AI, on the other hand, works by learning patterns from large amounts of data. It can produce impressive results, but it doesn't feel joy, sadness, or inspiration. While AI can be a helpful tool for artists and writers, many believe that human creativity has a special, irreplaceable quality.
